violations.description: STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Unwrapped utensils noted being offered in such a way that the lip or food portion must be touched to obtain the utensil. Stacks of cups are stored with food contact surface upright.
CONTAMINATION BY EMPLOYEES (3 pts): Bare hand contact with ready to eat food noted not being avoided.
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Unwrapped utensils noted being offered in such a way that the lip or food portion must be touched to obtain the utensil.
